HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200014287) FILED BY ASSIGNEE MID VALLEY COLLECTIONS BUREAU, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR AUG-31-2020 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ASSIGNEE MID VALLEY COLLECTIONS BUREAU, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DEFENDANT MONICA BARAJAS'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF STATES: "THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL NOT APPEAR AT THE HEARING AND SUBMITS THE ISSUE ON THE PAPERS FILED WITH THE COURT." ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE MID VALLEY COLLECTIONS BUREAU, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Monica Barajas's claim of exemption is granted. Plaintiff states: "The judgment creditor will not appear at the hearing and submits the issue on the papers filed with the court."

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Off Calendar
